_comment: live bucket — pass-through of an external HLS/MPEG-TS source. Disable loudness normalization (live streams already mix their own) and pick H.264 8-bit so cheap clients can decode without HEVC support. Bitrate left low; if the upstream is higher, transcoding will downsize. Playout window is long (7d+) — same single http item re-anchored daily, not 24h re-emits.
